label: Claw · Autocannon
description: A methodical light built to gut heavies. The claw pries armour open; the autocannon punches straight through the gap. Bring it when the enemy is wearing too much steel.

suggestedEquipment.reason: Duels heavies at close range — survive the trade.
Patch the plate the claw-work costs you.

label: Missile Barrage · Flamethrower
description: A walking bonfire. Rains missile volleys from range and washes close quarters in flame, leaving targets burning long after the salvo lands.

suggestedEquipment.reason: Already runs hot — weaponize the heat instead of fighting it.

label: Circular Saw · Mini Gun
description: It doesn't kill fast — it wears you down. The mini gun pins you in place while the circular saw grinds your frame into scrap that never repairs.

suggestedEquipment.reason: Stay latched on the target you're grinding.
Sustained fire runs the frame hot.

label: Wrecking Ball · Double MG
description: Fast, loud, and mean. Runs down the flank, hoses exposed arcs with the twin guns, and swings a wrecking ball hard enough to reshape whatever it hits.

suggestedEquipment.reason: A flanker gets flanked back — deny the side and rear shots.

label: Sword · Arc Gun
description: An electro-fencer that fights with heat. The arc gun cooks and jams the enemy's systems; the sword finishes whatever's left twitching.

suggestedEquipment.reason: The Arc Gun already cooks — turn redline into a threat.
Fence in and out of reach on demand.

label: Lance · Mortar
description: Half siege gun, half cavalry. Shells the field from across the table, then couches the lance and skewers anything that dares close the distance.

suggestedEquipment.reason: Reposition between the shelling and the charge.
Keep the mortar firing without cooking off.

label: Bulwark Shield · Siege Maul
description: An immovable object with a hammer. Plants on the objective behind a tower shield and refuses to die, cracking anything that comes within reach of the maul.

suggestedEquipment.reason: An objective-holder wants every extra plate.
Punish anything that tries to flank the anchor.

label: Sniper Cannon · Chainsaw
description: A patient killer. Opens with a devastating shot on a fresh target, then closes to butcher the wounded with a screaming chainsaw.

suggestedEquipment.reason: One shot per activation — make it land.
Extra actions to snipe then close in one turn.

label: Harpoon · Anchor
description: A tether rig. The harpoon spears a target at range and the anchor chains it down in the lock — pick one enemy and refuse to let it leave. Fragile, but nothing it grabs gets away.
focus: Control one target: spear it, anchor it, deny the escape.
balance: Light SP and one heavy shot per turn — it wins by pinning, not by trading blows. Loses if it can't close.
personality: Patient and vindictive. Marks a rig and hunts it to the scrapline.

suggestedEquipment.reason: Close the gap to spear, then never let go.
Fragile hull needs the extra armour to hold the lock.

label: Rivet Gun · Pressure Claw
description: An industrial brawler. The rivet gun stitches pins into a rig at spitting range; the pressure claw crushes its locations open in melee. Grinds a target down plate by plate.
focus: Attrition: seize a location with rivets, then crack it open with the claw.
balance: Short range and low STR per hit — it must get close and stay close. Rewards focus fire on one location.
personality: Methodical, mechanical, relentless. Treats an enemy rig like a stubborn bolt.

suggestedEquipment.reason: A short-range grinder must stay close and alive.
Outlast the target you're chewing apart.

label: Crossbow · Talon
description: Silver — a butcher-bird hunter. It cracks one enemy location with a surgical bolt, pounces in, and tears that same wound open with its talon.
focus: Pin & dismantle: soften a single location at range, lock in, and gut it. Weak on fresh armour by design — it must play the hunt, not brawl.
balance: Highest Peak ACC on the board (+3) but steep falloff and only STR 10 at 24" reach; the Talon is STR 7 and punishing on undamaged targets. Rewards range discipline and follow-through, not trading blows.
personality: Patient, predatory, precise. Marks its prey, waits for the band, then finishes what the bolt started.

suggestedEquipment.reason: Sharpen the shot — a sweet-spot bolt hunter needs the first hit to count.
Reposition to the band, then pounce.
